name: YouTube
description: Search YouTube videos and channels, retrieve video statistics (views, likes, comments), and explore content from any creator using the official YouTube Data API.

auth.hint: Create an API key at Google Cloud Console → APIs & Services → Credentials. Enable the YouTube Data API v3 on your project.

tools.name: search_videos
tools.description: Search YouTube for videos matching a keyword. Returns title, channel, and publication date.

params.name: type
params.description: Resource type: video, channel, or playlist

params.name: order
params.description: Sort by: date, rating, relevance, title, or viewCount

params.name: regionCode
params.description: Filter by country: 2-letter ISO code, e.g. US or BR

tools.name: get_video_details
tools.description: Get full details for a video: title, description, view count, likes, and duration.

params.name: id
params.description: Video ID from the YouTube URL (after ?v=), e.g. dQw4w9WgXcQ

tools.name: get_channel
tools.description: Get a YouTube channel's name, description, subscriber count, and total view count.

params.name: forUsername
params.description: Channel username (legacy, use id when possible)

tools.name: list_playlist_items
tools.description: List all videos in a YouTube playlist in order.

params.name: playlistId
params.description: Playlist ID from the YouTube URL
